---
title: "test_personas_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_personas_empire.py"
loc: 56
complexity: 3
logic_score: 3.57
style_score: 3.70
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 2.58
---

## Intent
The `test_personas_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on TestPersonasEmpire, test_get_strategy_resolution, test_quarantine_logic, test_odin_policy_defiance, test_voices, test_sync_configs_alfred. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TestPersonasEmpire, test_get_strategy_resolution, test_quarantine_logic, test_odin_policy_defiance, test_voices, test_sync_configs_alfred. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.core.personas](file://src.core.personas)

### Exports
- `TestPersonasEmpire`
- `test_get_strategy_resolution`
- `test_quarantine_logic`
- `test_odin_policy_defiance`
- `test_voices`
- `test_sync_configs_alfred`
